start journey equipment resources

Stefan's cello notes

Welcome. I just started to write about my cello activities. Don't know how this website will evolve.

If you like to comment, you can email me: sjaksch [at] mail [dot] de

  • my journey (how I came to playing the cello up to where I am right now)
  • my equipment (in short: one acoustic cello from Mittenwald and a NXTa 5-String electric cello plus some effects)
  • interesting resources (various links,...)
